  • Method Details

    • createBasket

      public BasketOrdersServiceCreateBasketRequestBuilder createBasket()
      Create Basket

      Creates an empty basket

      Upon successful submission, if the request is a duplicate, returns the existing basket in its current state in the system. If the request is not a duplicate, returns the summary of the newly created basket.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createBasket

      public BasketOrdersServiceCreateBasketResponse createBasket(String correspondentId, BasketCreate basketCreate) throws Exception
      Create Basket

      Creates an empty basket

      Upon successful submission, if the request is a duplicate, returns the existing basket in its current state in the system. If the request is not a duplicate, returns the summary of the newly created basket.

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      basketCreate - The message describing a basket
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createBasket

      public BasketOrdersServiceCreateBasketResponse createBasket(String correspondentId, BasketCreate basketCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Create Basket

      Creates an empty basket

      Upon successful submission, if the request is a duplicate, returns the existing basket in its current state in the system. If the request is not a duplicate, returns the summary of the newly created basket.

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      basketCreate - The message describing a basket
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • addOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceAddOrdersRequestBuilder addOrders()
      Add Orders

      Adds a list of basket orders to a basket

      Upon successful submission, returns the basket with a new total count of orders within the basket

      Returns:
      The call builder

      Upon successful submission, returns the basket with a new total count of orders within the basket

      basketId - The basket id.

      Returns:
      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails

      Exception - if the API call fails

      Get Basket

      Gets a basket by basket ID.

      Upon successful submission, returns the details of the queried basket

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • submitBasket

      public BasketOrdersServiceSubmitBasketRequestBuilder submitBasket()
      Submit Basket

      Submits a basket for execution in the market

      Upon successful submission, if the request is a duplicate, returns the existing basket in its current state in the system. If the request is not a duplicate, returns the summary of the newly submitted basket in a SUBMITTED state

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • submitBasket

      public BasketOrdersServiceSubmitBasketResponse submitBasket(String correspondentId, String basketId, SubmitBasketRequestCreate submitBasketRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Submit Basket

      Submits a basket for execution in the market

      Upon successful submission, if the request is a duplicate, returns the existing basket in its current state in the system. If the request is not a duplicate, returns the summary of the newly submitted basket in a SUBMITTED state

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      basketId - The basket id.
      submitBasketRequestCreate - The message to submit a basket for execution in the market
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • submitBasket

      public BasketOrdersServiceSubmitBasketResponse submitBasket(String correspondentId, String basketId, SubmitBasketRequestCreate submitBasketRequestCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Submit Basket

      Submits a basket for execution in the market

      Upon successful submission, if the request is a duplicate, returns the existing basket in its current state in the system. If the request is not a duplicate, returns the summary of the newly submitted basket in a SUBMITTED state

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      basketId - The basket id.
      submitBasketRequestCreate - The message to submit a basket for execution in the market
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listBasketOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceListBasketOrdersRequestBuilder listBasketOrders()
      List Basket Orders

      Gets a list of basket orders within a basket.

      Upon successful submission, returns a list of basket orders for the basket. If the list of basket orders becomes too large, a token is returned to retrieve the next page of basket orders.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listBasketOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceListBasketOrdersResponse listBasketOrders(BasketOrdersServiceListBasketOrdersRequest request) throws Exception
      List Basket Orders

      Gets a list of basket orders within a basket.

      Upon successful submission, returns a list of basket orders for the basket. If the list of basket orders becomes too large, a token is returned to retrieve the next page of basket orders.

      Parameters:
      request - The request object containing all the parameters for the API call.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listBasketOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceListBasketOrdersResponse listBasketOrders(BasketOrdersServiceListBasketOrdersRequest request, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Basket Orders

      Gets a list of basket orders within a basket.

      Upon successful submission, returns a list of basket orders for the basket. If the list of basket orders becomes too large, a token is returned to retrieve the next page of basket orders.

      Parameters:
      request - The request object containing all the parameters for the API call.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listCompressedOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceListCompressedOrdersRequestBuilder listCompressedOrders()
      List Compressed Orders

      Gets a list of compressed orders within a basket.

      Upon successful submission, returns a list of compressed orders for the basket. If the basket has not been submitted yet, this list will be empty. If the list of compressed orders becomes too large, a token is returned to retrieve the next page of compressed orders.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listCompressedOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceListCompressedOrdersResponse listCompressedOrders(String correspondentId, String basketId) throws Exception
      List Compressed Orders

      Gets a list of compressed orders within a basket.

      Upon successful submission, returns a list of compressed orders for the basket. If the basket has not been submitted yet, this list will be empty. If the list of compressed orders becomes too large, a token is returned to retrieve the next page of compressed orders.

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      basketId - The basket id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listCompressedOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceListCompressedOrdersResponse listCompressedOrders(String correspondentId, String basketId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Compressed Orders

      Gets a list of compressed orders within a basket.

      Upon successful submission, returns a list of compressed orders for the basket. If the basket has not been submitted yet, this list will be empty. If the list of compressed orders becomes too large, a token is returned to retrieve the next page of compressed orders.

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      basketId - The basket id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of compressed orders to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 1000 compressed orders will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListCompressedOrders` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page. When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListCompressedOrders` must match the call that provided the page token.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • removeOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceRemoveOrdersRequestBuilder removeOrders()
      Remove Basket Orders

      Removes a list of basket orders by client order ID.

      Upon successful submission, returns the details of the removed basket orders.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • removeOrders

      public BasketOrdersServiceRemoveOrdersResponse removeOrders(String correspondentId, String basketId, RemoveOrdersRequestCreate removeOrdersRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Remove Basket Orders

      Removes a list of basket orders by client order ID.

      Upon successful submission, returns the details of the removed basket orders.

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      basketId - The basket id.
      removeOrdersRequestCreate - The message to remove a list of basket orders by client order ID.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      basketId - The basket id.
      removeOrdersRequestCreate - The message to remove a list of basket orders by client order ID.
      options - additional options

      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails
